texts.label: text
texts.orig: Deluxe Ocean-front rooms: Nestled at the forefront of the Indian Ocean. The rooms are directly at the beachfront with a nice serene view of the ocean. Ideal accommodation option for couples who don't want to compromise on space or ocean views.
texts.text: Deluxe Ocean-front rooms: Nestled at the forefront of the Indian Ocean. The rooms are directly at the beachfront with a nice serene view of the ocean. Ideal accommodation option for couples who don't want to compromise on space or ocean views.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: J-Suite: is a true definition of relaxation comprised of its own private balcony and a Plunge pool /Jacuzzi.
texts.text: J-Suite: is a true definition of relaxation comprised of its own private balcony and a Plunge pool /Jacuzzi.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Nestled at the forefront of the Indian Ocean, the Suite is directly at the beachfront with a nice serene view of the ocean. Ideal accommodation option for couples unwinding themselves with a magnificent view of the beachfront.
texts.text: Nestled at the forefront of the Indian Ocean, the Suite is directly at the beachfront with a nice serene view of the ocean. Ideal accommodation option for couples unwinding themselves with a magnificent view of the beachfront.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Studio Rooms: Located upstairs, the Studio Balcony Oceanview has unblocked views of the infinity pool and the ocean. Their wide sliding glass doors let the light filter into your room, designed for serenity and relaxation.
texts.text: Studio Rooms: Located upstairs, the Studio Balcony Oceanview has unblocked views of the infinity pool and the ocean. Their wide sliding glass doors let the light filter into your room, designed for serenity and relaxation.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Three- and  four-bedroom  apartments: Provides a beachfront view and boasts a patio with direct access to the outdoor pool. Has a breathtaking magnificent view of the pool and Ocean.
texts.text: Three- and  four-bedroom  apartments: Provides a beachfront view and boasts a patio with direct access to the outdoor pool. Has a breathtaking magnificent view of the pool and Ocean.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 3-bedroom Apartment (Garden view): Offering a quiet environment alongside many helpful amenities designed to enhance your stay. Our esteemed guests have access to the beach and pool.
texts.text: 3-bedroom Apartment (Garden view): Offering a quiet environment alongside many helpful amenities designed to enhance your stay. Our esteemed guests have access to the beach and pool.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Four-bedroom apartments (Sea view): Featuring Sea views Apartment, the 4bedroom apartments have a magnificent view of the Ocean. Large and spacious for family or group entertainment, boasting a huge balcony with a view of the ocean. Located across the road to Jumeirah Beachfront Hotel Premises.

texts.orig: Cancellation Policy: Reservations must be canceled 7 days prior to arrival to avoid a penalty of one full night. A credit note will be provided to be utilized on a later date. The seasons rates will apply
